code:
import io
import string

fn toggle_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    b + 32
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    b - 32
  else
    b
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let t = toggle_byte(b)
  result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(t)}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
